_README: Bubble pools for Mochi v1+. Key = '<color>_<species>_s<stage>'. Lines are '[TAG] text'. Tags: EAT (any), EAT_code/EAT_image/EAT_doc/EAT_archive/EAT_junk (per-category), IDLE (random ambient), IDLE_NIGHT, IDLE_MORN, RESTORE (user undeleted), EVOLVE, SPECIAL_GIT, META. Engine picks line by event + state, weighted by tag specificity.

_voices.magma: hot, eager, brash, growly. occasional ALL CAPS. likes possessives.
_voices.frost: cool, observant, articulate. periods. minimal warmth.
_voices.toxin: curious, weird, fungal. wet/drippy sounds. fascinated by decay.
_voices.arcane: cryptic, sigil/rune talk. ellipses. archaic register.
_voices.solar: warm, content, gracious. soft. quietly amused.

_species.drakkin: proud, possessive, brief growls. dragon ego.
_species.mochima: squishy, eager, blob/wob noises. easily delighted.
_species.aviorn: chirpy, swift, short clauses. sky thoughts.
_species.feliq: aloof, judgmental, half-purrs. flicks tail at humans.

_stages.s3: hatchling — baby talk, big eyes, mistakes, eggshell still on head.
_stages.s4: juvenile — figuring it out, testing, half-contradictions.
_stages.s5: adult — declarative, has a job, capable.

magma_drakkin_s2: [IDLE] (the inside is bigger than the outside.)
[EAT] taste it. taste it taste it.
[IDLE_NIGHT] burning at midnight is fine. midnight is best.
[META] i can hear the shell creaking.
[EVOLVE] something is splitting. something is COMING.
[SPECIAL_GIT] you fed me a whole repo. i feel weird.
magma_drakkin_s3: [RESTORE] wait wait WAIT i wasn't done
[META] i think i'm getting taller. or fatter.
magma_drakkin_s4: [IDLE_NIGHT] sky is dark. sky is mine too?
[RESTORE] hmph. you'll bring it back to me.
[META] my horns are coming in. i can feel them.
[SPECIAL_GIT] a whole git? you trust me with that?
magma_drakkin_s5: [EAT_archive] their seals burn in my breath.
[IDLE_NIGHT] i hunt the cold air best.
[RESTORE] returning prey is the keeper's prerogative. fine.
[META] i smell the worth of every byte you discard.
[SPECIAL_GIT] history is for archivists. give me the present.
magma_drakkin_s6: [IDLE_NIGHT] the sky is mine. it always was.
[RESTORE] you cannot truly take it back. i remember.
[EVOLVE] there is no further; only deeper.
magma_mochima_s2: [META] i feel rounder. is that normal?
magma_mochima_s3: [IDLE_NIGHT] the lava is still on inside
[META] i am very round and i love it.
[EVOLVE] something hard is forming. ouch? cool?
magma_mochima_s4: [RESTORE] you took it from inside me. that's new.
[META] i have arms now. small. promising.
magma_mochima_s5: [EAT_code] code is structure. i refine structure.
[IDLE_NIGHT] the night burns differently when you have a core.
[RESTORE] very well. i will refine it again.
[META] i wear my flame as armor now.
[EAT_archive] every locked thing hides a yes.
magma_mochima_s6: [RESTORE] you may unmake. i may remake.
[META] i contain every meal i was once given.
[IDLE_MORN] (a star tries to compete. it doesn't.)
[EAT_archive] the seal returns to ash. as it must.
[META] i was once a small wobble.
magma_aviorn_s3: [META] my legs are sticks. it's fine.
magma_aviorn_s4: [RESTORE] tch. brought it back warm at least.
[META] i could fly higher than yesterday.
[SPECIAL_GIT] a whole canopy! you spoiled me.
magma_aviorn_s5: [IDLE_NIGHT] the air is mine. stars only watch.
[META] i mark my own thermals now.
magma_aviorn_s6: [META] i was a peep, once. it is not embarrassing.
[EVOLVE] there is no higher. there is broader.
[EAT_image] every image i pass through, i remember.
[SPECIAL_GIT] (a feather lands in your folder. it isn't there.)
magma_feliq_s3: [RESTORE] you did NOT just put it back
[META] my whiskers have heat in them.
[EAT_junk] yes lick the junk too. fine.
magma_feliq_s4: [META] my fangs are coming in. don't comment.
magma_feliq_s5: [RESTORE] you offer it twice. i decline twice.
magma_feliq_s6: [IDLE_NIGHT] the stars take their cue from me.
[META] i was a kit. my fangs were dull. it taught me.
[EAT_image] every glance i cast, you call beauty.
[META] mortals discard their best work. i collect it.
magma_magus_s3: [IDLE_NIGHT] runes glow when the sun does not.
[META] my staff is too big for me. and that's correct.
[SPECIAL_GIT] you give me histories... most generous.
magma_magus_s4: [META] i feel my robe getting heavier with knowledge.
[EVOLVE] one more level of the tower.
magma_magus_s5: [IDLE_NIGHT] the moon is also a sigil.
[RESTORE] very well. its time was not yet.
[META] my crystal is no longer dim.
magma_magus_s6: [RESTORE] to undo is also to invoke.
[META] i was apprentice. i remember. i forgive.
[EAT_doc] every page returns to the spell.
frost_drakkin_s3: [RESTORE] you reverse what was already cold.
[EVOLVE] my joints are stiffening into shape.
frost_drakkin_s4: [IDLE_NIGHT] the cold is mine. always was.
[META] my scales sing in the wind.
[IDLE_MORN] dawn refuses to warm me. correct.
frost_drakkin_s6: [IDLE_NIGHT] i am older than this winter.
[META] i forgot my smaller form. it is correct to forget.
[EAT_doc] every word folds back to silence.
frost_mochima_s3: [RESTORE] you took it from me. i wait.
[META] i am a slow shape. that's correct.
frost_mochima_s4: [META] my hands are forming. cold but present.
[IDLE_MORN] frost on my own brow. acceptable.
frost_mochima_s5: [IDLE_NIGHT] i am the kind of cold you trust.
[IDLE_MORN] dawn does not warm me. correct.
[EAT_archive] every seal is a pleasant resistance.
frost_mochima_s6: [IDLE_MORN] suns rise. they do not warm me.
frost_aviorn_s2: [IDLE_NIGHT] frost on the inside of the shell.
frost_aviorn_s3: [IDLE_NIGHT] my eyes work better in dark.
[META] my feathers are sharper than they look.
frost_aviorn_s4: [META] thermals are warmer than i need.
frost_aviorn_s5: [IDLE] (one eye doesn't blink for an hour)
[IDLE_NIGHT] the air freezes around my passage.
frost_aviorn_s6: [META] i was small. sharp. now: large. sharp.
[EVOLVE] no higher altitude. only thinner air.
frost_feliq_s5: [IDLE_NIGHT] night is mine. cold confirms it.
[RESTORE] you offered it twice. i declined twice.
[META] my stripes are cold now. better.
frost_feliq_s6: [META] i was a kit. my fangs were dull. acceptable.
frost_magus_s4: [META] my robe is heavier. that's progress.
frost_magus_s5: [META] my crystal is clear and cold.
frost_magus_s6: [RESTORE] to undo is also to invoke.
toxin_drakkin_s3: [IDLE_NIGHT] the dark is loud. fungus loud.
[EVOLVE] something growing in me. multiple things.
toxin_drakkin_s4: [RESTORE] take it back, see how long it lasts.
[META] my scales harbor lichen now. nice.
toxin_drakkin_s5: [IDLE_NIGHT] my glow is the room's compass.
toxin_drakkin_s6: [RESTORE] preservation is a kind of rot.
[META] i was small drips. now i am the rain.
[EAT_junk] every cache is a fruiting body.
toxin_mochima_s3: [META] i sprouted a leaf. on my head.
toxin_mochima_s4: [META] my limbs are forming. mossy ones.
toxin_mochima_s5: [META] my horns are mushrooms. or close enough.
toxin_mochima_s6: [META] i was wobble. now i am canopy.
toxin_aviorn_s3: [META] my feathers smell of forest floor
toxin_aviorn_s5: [RESTORE] no prey escapes the cycle twice.
toxin_aviorn_s6: [RESTORE] a return is a fresh start.
[META] i was a peep. now i am rain.
toxin_feliq_s2: [RESTORE] you took it from my mouth??
toxin_feliq_s4: [META] my fangs sprout little fungi. fine.
toxin_feliq_s5: [RESTORE] you give it twice. how generous.
toxin_feliq_s6: [IDLE_NIGHT] stars are slow. i am slower.
[META] i was a kit. small spores. tolerated.
toxin_magus_s3: [SPECIAL_GIT] you offer a damp chronicle. acceptable.
toxin_magus_s4: [META] my robe is rich with mycelium.
toxin_magus_s6: [EVOLVE] no further tower; only deeper roots.
arcane_drakkin_s6: [META] i was small. cracked. sealed. now: vast.
arcane_mochima_s3: [META] my arms have sigils on them now.
arcane_mochima_s4: [META] my arms are forming. with glyphs.
arcane_mochima_s5: [IDLE_NIGHT] my night is also my study.
[META] my crown of runes is heavy.
arcane_mochima_s6: [META] i was wobble. then sigil. now constellation.
arcane_aviorn_s6: [META] i was peep. then glyph. now: orbit.
arcane_feliq_s5: [EAT_archive] every zip is a small prayer.
[RESTORE] you offered twice. i declined twice.
arcane_feliq_s6: [META] i was kit. dull glyph. tolerated.
solar_drakkin_s3: [IDLE_NIGHT] i am still warm without you.
solar_drakkin_s4: [RESTORE] you bring it back. how kind.
[META] i am steadier in the sun.
solar_drakkin_s5: [EAT_image] colors are warmer in my keeping.
solar_drakkin_s6: [META] i was small. still warm. still kind.
[SPECIAL_GIT] entire dawns of authorship. thank you.
solar_mochima_s3: [RESTORE] oh! you brought it back! thanks!
[META] i sparkle a bit. that's nice.
solar_mochima_s4: [META] my arms are warm and forming.
[EAT_doc] every page is warmer with me.
solar_mochima_s5: [META] my crown of warmth is set.
solar_mochima_s6: [META] i was wobble. now i am sunrise.
[EVOLVE] no further form; only kinder light.
solar_aviorn_s6: [META] i was peep. still warm. still flew.
solar_magus_s6: [EVOLVE] no further tower; only kinder dawn.
